name: Special City Council Closed Session
summary:
• Special City Council meeting on June 11, 2026 at 2:00 PM will focus exclusively on closed-session matters; no other business is scheduled.
  • Labor negotiations are on the agenda for the Police Employees’ Association and Municipal Employees’ Association, with City Manager Dave Kiff serving as the designated representative.
  • Multiple real property negotiations will be discussed in closed session, including 650C Laguna Canyon Road and several APNs: 656-032-03, 656-012-08, 646-012-05, and 646-032-20.
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS📄 Planning Files🏗️ Building Files
  • Potential litigation exposure is also being reviewed, tied to a 2023 FIRE claim that the Forest Avenue Promenade regulations may violate the First Amendment.
  • Next meeting is tentatively set for June 23, 2026, with a closed session at 4:00 PM and regular meeting at 5:00 PM at 505 Forest Avenue, Laguna Beach.

name: Design Review Board
summary:
• Key hearing item: The Design Review Board’s main business is a set of development applications, including several ADU, single-family residence, and coastal permit requests.
  • 2885 Rounsevel Terrace (APN 656-165-12): Request to allow an existing ADU to encroach about 9.3 inches into the required side setback; staff recommends continuing the hearing to July 23, 2026.
    📍 Google Maps🗺️ City GIS📄 Planning Files🏗️ Building Files
  • 341 Holly Street (APN 496-035-01): Proposal for an attached upper-level ADU plus a variance to exceed 1,500 square feet and allow only one uncovered parking space; staff recommends approval.
  • 954 Rembrandt Drive (APN 644-232-42): Modifications to a home under construction, including a new elevated deck, expanded deck areas, habitable space conversion, and exterior changes; staff recommends approval.
  • 1375 Circle Way (APN 053-131-09): Proposed additions, remodel, roof changes, new elevator, landscaping, and site improvements for an existing single-family residence; staff recommends approval.
  • 31461 Coast Hwy (APN 056-032-27): Requested deck expansions over existing flat roof areas on two levels of a previously approved home project.
seo_text: 1. CALL TO ORDER 2. PUBLIC COMMUNICATIONS - At this time, members of the public may address the Design Review Board regarding any items not on the agenda but within the subject matter jurisdiction of the Design Review Board. No action may be taken on off-agenda items unless authorized by law. Comments shall be limited to three (3) minutes each and fifteen (15) minutes for all comments, unless extended for good cause by the Design Review Board. 3. MODIFICATION OF AGENDA ORDER 4. CONSENT CALENDAR

name: Heritage Committee - CANCELED
summary:
• Meeting canceled: The June 15, 2025 Heritage Committee meeting did not occur.
  • Next meeting scheduled: The committee’s next regular meeting is set for July 20, 2025 at 6:00 PM.
  • Administrative notice only: The agenda contains a standard ADA accommodations notice with City Clerk contact information.
  • No project or address-specific items: No Laguna Beach physical address or APN is mentioned, and no substantive heritage review items appear on this agenda.
